form.formComment: He is resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Not seen since he finished last in a small field at Veliefendi September 21 over 1600m, 12 len behind Aimus Liberatus carrying 55kg at $10.30. On debut fifth of 8 at Veliefendi August 15 over 1300m, 15 len behind Seek And Destroy carrying 57kg at $6.70. Not keen on his chances.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At debut, 3rd of 12 at this track on February 14 over 1500m, 4 len behind Mercier with 58kg at $5.45. Last start 3rd of 11 at Antalya on March 12 over 1400m, 11 len behind Nart The Wolf with 58kg at $2.90. Will find this too tough.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 49 days. Resuming 10th of 12 at this track on January 28 over 1300m, 14 len behind Laguna Sunset carrying 58kg at $5.40. Last start crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 2nd of 14 at this track on February 21 over 1500m, 3.5 len behind Vantabella carrying 58kg at $15.50. Thereabouts last time but others are preferred.
